Headline: Closure - Alderley Edge School for Girls, Cheshire
Info: Alderley Edge School for Girls has closed with immediate effect after bosses claimed the building is unsafe, with the site now presenting potential for redevelopment.

Headline: Closure - Diseworth Church of England Primary School (State), Leicestershire
Info: A top Leicestershire education chief has officially defended the upcoming closure of Diseworth C of E Primary School, stating it was not financially viable to keep open due to falling pupil numbers and a large deficit.

Headline: Closure - Pitsford School, Northamptonshire
Info: Pitsford School, an independent school for pupils aged four to 18, has announced it will permanently close on 10 July 2026 due to severe financial pressures [4.1.1]. The headteacher cited the introduction of VAT on fees, increased wages, and wider economic uncertainty as key factors.
